name: AWS CloudFront access log
sampleLines: 2024-04-28	04:02:03	IAD12-C1	1234	192.0.2.10	GET	d111111abcdef8.cloudfront.net	/index.html	200	-	Mozilla/5.0	-	-	Hit	abc123-edge-request-id==	www.example.com	https	-	0.001	-	TLSv1.3	TLS_AES_128_GCM_SHA256	Hit	HTTP/2.0

2024-04-28	04:02:04	FRA50-P1	-	2001:db8::1	GET	distribution.example.net	/api/v1/health	304	http://example.com/	curl/8.5.0	q=1&x=2	-	RefreshHit	reqid=xyz	cdn.example.com	https	512	0.123	-	TLSv1.2	ECDHE-RSA-AES128-GCM-SHA256	RefreshHit	HTTP/1.1
description: Adapted from logstash-plugins/logstash-patterns-core patterns/ecs-v1/aws (Apache-2.0), entry CLOUDFRONT_ACCESS_LOG. Inlined %{YEAR}, %{MONTHNUM}, %{MONTHDAY}, %{TIME}, %{IP}, %{NUMBER}, %{WORD}, %{NOTSPACE}, %{HOSTNAME} macros to plain PCRE2; the fields after `http_version` (csf_protocol, csf_result_type, csf_cipher, ...) AWS added in 2018+ are accepted as a trailing free-text run.
